overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a black sports car driving through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The vehicle navigates elevated highways, off-ramps, and urban intersections with heavy atmospheric haze and prominent holographic billboards.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an elevated highway at night, flanked by concrete barriers and illuminated by neon billboards. The camera follows from behind as the car approaches a large overhead gantry structure in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Back on the elevated highway, the vehicle passes through a toll gantry structure and drives past dense clusters of holographic billboards on both sides. The road stretches ahead toward an overhead sign bridge with a neon-lit tower visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the highway via an exit ramp and navigates a city intersection marked by an Olivia street sign. The environment shifts to street level with commercial buildings, pedestrians on sidewalks, and an overhead walkway visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a more enclosed urban canyon with overpasses overhead and pedestrians visible on the sidewalks. The street is lined with close-up building facades, street lamps, and vertical neon billboards, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a black sports car transitions from the open expanse of an elevated highway into the dense, claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins by trailing the vehicle along a high-speed road flanked by concrete barriers and glowing billboards, moving steadily toward a distant overhead gantry. As the car takes a sharp right turn down an off-ramp, the perspective descends past a red neon bar sign and futuristic buildings before returning to the highway to pass through a toll structure surrounded by clusters of holographic displays. The scene then shifts again as the vehicle exits the highway to navigate a street-level intersection marked by an Olivia sign, passing pedestrians and an overhead walkway. Finally, the camera follows the car into a narrow urban corridor where towering building facades and vertical neon signs close in from both sides under a network of low-hanging overpasses.
